'''âdh-r-b-sh''' ('''kadharbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monologise|monologise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monologise|monologise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-r-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadharbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharbeshoko|thidharbeshoko]] || [[word:jidharbeshoko|jidharbeshoko]] || [[word:shidharbeshoko|shidharbeshoko]] || [[word:kidharbeshoko|kidharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudharbeshoko|thuthudharbeshoko]] || [[word:jujudharbeshoko|jujudharbeshoko]] || [[word:shushudharbeshoko|shushudharbeshoko]] || [[word:kukudharbeshoko|kukudharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudharbeshoko|thudharbeshoko]] || [[word:judharbeshoko|judharbeshoko]] || [[word:shudharbeshoko|shudharbeshoko]] || [[word:kudharbeshoko|kudharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudharbeshoko|thudharbeshoko]] || [[word:judharbeshoko|judharbeshoko]] || [[word:shudharbeshoko|shudharbeshoko]] || [[word:kudharbeshoko|kudharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedharbeshoko|thedharbeshoko]] || [[word:jedharbeshoko|jedharbeshoko]] || [[word:shedharbeshoko|shedharbeshoko]] || [[word:kedharbeshoko|kedharbeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodharbeshoko|thodharbeshoko]] || [[word:jodharbeshoko|jodharbeshoko]] || [[word:shodharbeshoko|shodharbeshoko]] || [[word:kodharbeshoko|kodharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharbeshoko|thodharbeshoko]] || [[word:jodharbeshoko|jodharbeshoko]] || [[word:shodharbeshoko|shodharbeshoko]] || [[word:kodharbeshoko|kodharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdharbeshoko|thĂŠdharbeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdharbeshoko|jĂŠdharbeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdharbeshoko|shĂŠdharbeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdharbeshoko|kĂŠdharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadharbeshoko|thathadharbeshoko]] || [[word:jajadharbeshoko|jajadharbeshoko]] || [[word:shashadharbeshoko|shashadharbeshoko]] || [[word:kakadharbeshoko|kakadharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadharbeshoko|thadharbeshoko]] || [[word:jadharbeshoko|jadharbeshoko]] || [[word:shadharbeshoko|shadharbeshoko]] || [[word:kadharbeshoko|kadharbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharbeshoko|thadharbeshoko]] || [[word:jadharbeshoko|jadharbeshoko]] || [[word:shadharbeshoko|shadharbeshoko]] || [[word:kadharbeshoko|kadharbeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadharbeshithi|shadharbeshithi]] || [[word:shadharbeshiji|shadharbeshiji]] || [[word:shadharbeshishi|shadharbeshishi]] || [[word:shadharbeshiki|shadharbeshiki]]
